mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${prefix}AGENT_INSTANCE ( AGENT_INSTANCE_KEY,ELEMENT_ID, PROCESS_INSTANCE_KEY, ROOT_PROCESS_INSTANCE_KEY, PROCESS_DEFINITION_ID, PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, PROCESS_DEFINITION_VERSION, VERSION_TAG, TENANT_ID, PARTITION_ID, STATUS, MODEL, PROVIDER, SYSTEM_PROMPT, MAX_TOKENS, MAX_MODEL_CALLS, MAX_TOOL_CALLS, INPUT_TOKENS, OUTPUT_TOKENS, MODEL_CALLS, TOOL_CALLS, TOOLS, CREATION_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_DATE, COMPLETION_DATE ) VALUES ( #{agentInstanceKey}, #{elementId}, #{processInstanceKey}, #{rootProcessInstanceKey}, #{processDefinitionId}, #{processDefinitionKey}, #{processDefinitionVersion}, #{versionTag}, #{tenantId}, #{partitionId}, #{status}, #{model}, #{provider}, #{systemPrompt, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{maxTokens}, #{maxModelCalls}, #{maxToolCalls}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{modelCalls}, #{toolCalls}, #{tools, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{creationDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastUpdatedDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{completionDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ${prefix}AGENT_INSTANCE SET STATUS = #{status}, INPUT_TOKENS = #{inputTokens}, OUTPUT_TOKENS = #{outputTokens}, MODEL_CALLS = #{modelCalls}, TOOL_CALLS = #{toolCalls}, TOOLS = #{tools, jdbcType=CLOB}, LAST_UPDATED_DATE = #{lastUpdatedDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} , COMPLETION_DATE = #{completionDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE AGENT_INSTANCE_KEY = #{agentInstanceKey}
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO ${prefix}AGENT_INSTANCE_ELEMENT_INSTANCE (AGENT_INSTANCE_KEY, ELEMENT_INSTANCE_KEY) VALUES (#{agentInstanceKey}, #{elementInstanceKey})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
